name: backreference_raw_string
description: Backreference for matching raw string delimiters (C++-style)

name: undefined_backreference
description: Referencing undefined backreference fails to compile

name: nested_capture_html_tags
description: Nested HTML-like tag matching with backreference
grammar:
ROOT <- CONTENT
CONTENT <- (ELEMENT / TEXT)*
ELEMENT <- $(STAG CONTENT ETAG)
STAG <- '<' $tag< TAG_NAME > '>'
ETAG <- '</' $tag '>'
TAG_NAME <- 'b' / 'u'
TEXT <- TEXT_DATA
TEXT_DATA <- ![<] .

name: backreference_in_sequence
description: Simple backreference matching same text twice

name: backreference_with_choices
grammar:
S <- OPEN CONTENT CLOSE
OPEN <- $delim<'(' / '[' / '{'>
CLOSE <- $delim
CONTENT <- [a-z]+

name: backreference_with_zero_or_more
grammar:
TREE <- WRONG_BRANCH* CORRECT_BRANCH
WRONG_BRANCH <- BRANCH THAT IS_capture WRONG
CORRECT_BRANCH <- BRANCH THAT IS_backref CORRECT
BRANCH <- 'branch'
THAT <- 'that'
IS_capture <- $ref<..>
IS_backref <- $ref
WRONG <- 'wrong'
CORRECT <- 'correct'
